items.title: Solid game with great gameplay
items.summary:
I didn’t expect to enjoy this sort of game this much. I’ve had bad experiences with card turn based gacha games before, but this is a really good refreshing take on combat for gachas. Of course it helps that the characters look really interesting

The game is really F2P friendly as far as I’ve experienced. But the combat, character art, and great story make me want to support them more
items.author: Joules Watt
